violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the back storage area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back storage, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024

The walls in the back storage area is in poor repair. Observed damage coving, holes, and brown and black residue The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
